texto: Receptionist: How do you write women so well?Melvin Udall: I think of a man, and I take away reason and accountability.
autor: Melvin Udall played by Jack Nicholson in AS GOOD AS IT GETS.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Melvin Udall played by Jack Nicholson in AS GOOD AS IT GETS. que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Receptionist: How do you write women so well?Melvin Udall: I think of a man, and I take away reas…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, accountability, women, com foco em women e writing.
